nasb.text: And men will say, “Surely there is a reward for the righteous; Surely there is a God who judges on earth!”

esv.text: Mankind will say, “Surely there is a reward for the righteous; surely there is a God who judges on earth.”

cnv.text: 因此，人必說：“義人果然有善報； 在世上確有一位施行審判的　神。”

ccb.text: 这样，人们必说： “义人终有善报， 确实有一位审判天下的上帝。”

csbs.text: 这样，人们就会说：“义人确实有善报！ 确实有一位在地上施行审判的神！”
